# BulkaPromote — Full-Cycle Digital Agency

## About
BulkaPromote is a full-cycle digital agency based in Shymkent, Kazakhstan.
Founded: 2025
Founder: Talgat Shyrshykbek — 11+ years in digital marketing and web development
Mission: Digitize offline businesses in 30 days
Clients served: businesses in Kazakhstan, UAE, Saudi Arabia, and worldwide (remote)

## Contact
- Website: https://bulkapromote.com
- Email: ceo@bulkapromote.com
- Phone: +7 771 196 96 00
- Telegram: https://t.me/bulkapromote
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/77711969600
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bulkapromote/
- Office: 47 Ilyaeva St., BC Beskuduk Tas, 3rd floor, office 310, Shymkent, Kazakhstan

## Services

### 1. Website Development
- Technologies: WordPress + Bricks Builder, WooCommerce, HTML + Tailwind CSS
- Types: Landing pages (7–14 days), business websites (14–21 days), online stores (21–30 days)
- Includes: design, development, mobile optimization, CMS, hosting setup

### 2. SEO (Search Engine Optimization)
- Keyword research and semantic core
- Technical audit and on-page optimization
- Content creation and publication
- Link building
- Monthly ranking and traffic reports
- Results: +40% organic traffic in 6 months (oxanason.kz case)

### 3. Paid Advertising (Google Ads / Yandex.Direct)
- Campaign setup and targeting
- A/B testing of creatives
- Ongoing optimization to reduce cost-per-lead
- Results: 200+ leads in 2 months (pintashymkent.kz case)
- Reduces CPL by up to 30% through optimization

### 4. SMM (Social Media Marketing)
- Platforms: Instagram, Facebook
- Content creation and publishing schedule
- Targeted advertising
- Community management and audience growth

### 5. CRM Integration & Automation
- CRM systems setup and integration
- Email sequences and sales funnels
- Workflow automation via n8n
- Business processes on autopilot

### 6. Web Analytics
- Google Analytics 4 setup
- Conversion tracking
- Custom dashboards
- Data-driven decision support

## Pricing
- Pricing: by agreement (individual per project)
- Free initial consultation available
- Minimum engagement: discussed individually
- Languages of service: Russian, Kazakh, English, Arabic, Turkish, Spanish, German

## How We Work (Process)
1. Free consultation — we discuss your project (48 hours to start)
2. Brief and requirements analysis
3. Individual proposal and timeline
4. Development and implementation
5. Testing and launch
6. Ongoing support and optimization
7. Monthly reports with KPIs

## What Makes Us Different
- Uses 15 specialized AI agents internally (not sold to clients — used for faster, better results)
- AI agents cover: strategy, competitor analysis, SEO keywords, copywriting, web dev, ads, CRM, analytics, reporting
- End-to-end service: one team handles website + traffic + leads + automation
- Real results from real projects — no inflated metrics
- Work remotely worldwide

## Completed Projects

### saryagash-bron.kz
- Industry: Tourism / Health resorts
- Work done: Online booking system, WordPress, online payments, resort database integration

### oxanason.kz
- Industry: Education (English language school, Shymkent)
- Work done: Full digital cycle from scratch — WordPress site (schedule, prices, online enrollment), registration on Google Maps + Yandex Maps + Google Business Profile + local directories, SEO (keyword research, technical optimization, content), Google Ads + Yandex.Direct campaigns
- Lead delivery: inquiries forwarded to client via Telegram (name + phone + question)
- Reporting: monthly reports on traffic, sources, enrollments, ad spend and ROI
- Result: +40% organic traffic in 6 months, 200+ leads via paid ads, −30% cost per lead after optimization

### pintashymkent.kz
- Industry: Food delivery / Restaurant
- Work done: WooCommerce, CRM integration, Yandex.Delivery API, loyalty program, retargeting
- Result: 200+ leads in 2 months via Google Ads

### wayto.kz (in progress)
- Industry: Study abroad agency
- Work done: SEO, content, Google Ads — full digital cycle

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much do your services cost?
A: Pricing is individual and depends on the task, niche, and business scale. We study your request and propose the optimal solution for your budget. Contact us for a free consultation.

Q: How long does it take to build a website?
A: Landing page: 7–14 days. Business website: 14–21 days. Online store (e-commerce): 21–30 days. Exact timeline is set after requirements discussion.

Q: Do you work with clients outside Kazakhstan?
A: Yes. Our physical office is in Shymkent, but we work remotely with clients worldwide. All communication and reports are done online.

Q: What does SEO include?
A: Site audit, keyword research, technical optimization, content creation and publication, backlink building, and monthly reports on rankings and traffic.

Q: How do I start working with you?
A: Contact us via Telegram, WhatsApp, or email. We conduct a free consultation, study your project, and provide a work plan. Work begins within 48 hours of agreement.

Q: Do you guarantee results?
A: We work toward measurable outcomes: traffic, number of leads, cost of acquisition. We don't guarantee specific positions in Google — those depend on their algorithm. All KPIs are defined before work begins.

Q: What technology do you use to build websites?
A: WordPress + Bricks Builder for multi-page sites and online stores. HTML + Tailwind CSS for landing pages and fast one-page sites. All sites are mobile-first and optimized for Core Web Vitals.

Q: How do you use AI in your work?
A: We use 15 specialized AI agents internally — for strategy, SEO research, copywriting, competitor analysis, and reporting. This makes our work faster and more precise. Clients get results; AI is our internal tool.

Q: Do you provide ongoing support after launch?
A: Yes. We offer ongoing SEO, advertising management, content updates, and technical support after the website launches.

Q: In which languages do you provide services?
A: Russian, Kazakh, English, Arabic, Turkish, Spanish, German. Our website is available in RU / EN / AR / TR / ES / DE / KK.

## Service Areas
- Kazakhstan (primary): Shymkent, Almaty, Astana, and all regions
- International (remote): UAE, Saudi Arabia, and worldwide

## Technology Stack
| Category | Tools |
|----------|-------|
| CMS | WordPress, Bricks Builder, WooCommerce |
| Frontend | HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS |
| Analytics | Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager |
| Advertising | Google Ads, Yandex.Direct |
| Automation | n8n, CRM integrations |
| AI (internal) | 15-agent system (strategy → delivery → reporting) |
